# LiveOps Calendar — {PROJECT_NAME}

## Cadence
| Week / Date | Beat | Goal | Reward / Offer | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Week 1 | Event beat | Retention / engagement | Cosmetic reward or content drop | Liveops owner |

Use the calendar to show lead time, review windows, and the smallest repeatable live-ops loop that the team can actually sustain.

## Operational constraints
- Content lead time, QA windows, pricing review, analytics follow-up

## Risk notes
- Burnout, content churn, economy inflation, comms overhead
